rationale: Gov't Code §2306.183 concerns the housing finance division's strategy for serving rural areas. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The department may adopt a target strategy to ensure that the credit and housing needs of qualifying individuals and families who reside in rural areas and small municipalities are equitably served by the housing finance division.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
